svg.text: Direct Polaris Lending Flow: Process + Database + External Integrations
Clear lifecycle map for no-LOS lending and BNPL. Center is the operation flow; left shows tables written/read; right shows API calls; bottom shows failure and double-spend controls.

g.text: DAN, HUR, Sain/FICO, QPay, Merchant POS,
Admin configures product/transaction codes and merchant/POS accounts before
Customer registers, verifies OTP, logs in, and creates transaction
Customer authorizes identity lookup; app stores structured KYC, files,
System creates/updates customer in Polaris and creates the customer
CASA/deposit account used for grants and repayments.
Credit Scoring + Polaris Risk Field Sync
Credit Scoring + Polaris Risk Field Sync
Risk engine stores FICO, custom score, model version, factors, final grade,
and syncs score fields to Polaris.
Credit Scoring + Polaris Risk Field Sync
Local limit becomes active, then a Polaris line account is created/opened
using custCode, deposit acntCode, and product config.
Loan Start: One-tap Application or BNPL Invoice
Loan Start: One-tap Application or BNPL Invoice
Customer starts a one-tap loan or scans a merchant BNPL QR. The app
validates KYC, active deposit, active line, and product terms.
Loan Start: One-tap Application or BNPL Invoice
Line row is locked; requested amount is reserved before approval.
Loan core starts only after reservation. Child loan account is
created/opened in Polaris and stored locally.
Repayment schedule is calculated and created in Polaris; child loan is
linked to the line before any grant.
Money movement is posted in Polaris: child loan account to the customer
deposit account. Local ledger stores jrno.
For BNPL, customer deposit is transferred to merchant passive account. POS
approval is sent only after confirmed transfer.
Real repayment money arrives first to customer deposit, then customer
Schedules are locked before allocation. Final payment checks closing
details, closes loan account, and reduces line utilization.
Daily reconciliation proves Polaris truth, resolves pending_reconcile,
handles reversals, reports and sensitive exports.

svg.text: SAFETY CONTROLS USED ACROSS THE FLOW

g.text: Stable key per operation. Retry after
timeout must reuse the same key.
Every Polaris write call goes through
Line reservation, POS invoice lock, QPay

svg.text: Status rules: failed = confirmed failure | pending_reconcile = unknown Polaris result | dead_letter = unresolved automatically and needs finance/manual review.
